stage.hint: Scroll to zoom · hold Space to pan

crop.hint: Drag the frame to move, drag a handle to resize; press outside to draw a new frame.

mask.promptPlaceholder: Describe how you want the painted area changed…
mask.hint: Paint the area to repaint (red). In the exported mask the painted area is transparent and the rest is white.

split.hintEqual: Split evenly by rows and columns; the seam gap trims half its width on each side of every line to remove AI grid-image seams.
split.hintCustom: After adding a line, drag it on the canvas to fine-tune; each line has its own seam gap.

upscale.progressiveDesc: Steps up 2× at a time for smoother edges
upscale.nearestDesc: Keeps hard pixels, good for pixel art
upscale.hint: Local interpolation only raises resolution without adding detail; use AI super-resolution for a sharper result.
